_meta.generator: Overpass API (overpass-api.de / kumi mirror) one combined query per city + web cross-check of marquee venues for official websites/addresses; town from addr:city or reverse-resolved
_meta.attribution: Map data © OpenStreetMap contributors, available under the Open Database License (ODbL) 1.0 — https://www.openstreetmap.org/copyright / https://opendatacommons.org/licenses/odbl/
_meta.search_area: ~20km radius around Wien, Graz, Salzburg, Innsbruck, Klagenfurt, St. Pölten, Bregenz/Dornbirn, Eisenstadt, Wels, Steyr
notes: Facts (name/address/hours/website) only — no source prose copied; descriptions are one-line factual summaries written for this dataset, null where the venue is not personally verifiable.
categories[] uses the PLACE_CATS taxonomy (playground|pool|park|trail|indoor_play|museum|zoo|climbing); finer-grained type preserved in _osm_category.
_osm_type/_osm_id/_wheelchair are provenance-only fields; scripts/seed-places.mjs drops them before insert.
opening_hours only for simple, confidently-parsed weekly patterns from OSM tags; complex/seasonal rules => null + human `seasonal` note.
Deduped against places-family-linz.json by normalized title+town (relevant for Wels/Steyr edges).
Entries whose municipality could not be confidently resolved were dropped rather than guessed.
